title: 1Z1D8Wtpl2O9M1Tladho5Tu8Cx6S2Y
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Despite mixed economic data, a risk-on tone helped stem the selling earlier this week in commodity markets. Copper was under pressure earlier in the session following Chinese data showing profits at industrial companies fell 19% in March. This was compounded by reports that Chinese copper processors were planning to reduce production for Q2 2023.
